MASTER CALENDAR JURY

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order Limiting Contact With Defendant By Plaintif
Off Calendar Nov-29-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT BAYVIEW HUNTERS POINT MULTIPURPOSE SENIOR's Motion For Protective Order Limiting Contact With Defendant By Plaintiff.

No appearances are made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Matter is transferred to be heard on the discovery calendar (room 301) at 9:00 a.m. on the same date.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)

Defendant Bayview Hunters Point Multipurpose Senior Services, Inc.'S Motion For Protective Order Limiting Contact With Defendant By Plaintiff
Off Calendar Nov-29-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Joel Warren, (707.339.0294) Plaintiff in propria persona.
Jonathan Varnica, Esq. (415.398.0200; jvarnica@vmbllp.com) of Vogl Meredith Burke LLP for Defendant.

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

Discussed. Counsel for moving party stated the motion is withdrawn and he will work with the client to address the needs without a court order. The Court rules as follows:

Defendant Bayview Hunters Point Multipurpose Senior Services, Inc.'S Motion For Protective Order Limiting Contact With Defendant By Plaintiff is off calendar; withdrawn by moving party.

Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Aug-24-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD AS TO PLAINTIFF JOEL WARREN.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Motion granted. No opposition filed, and good cause shown.

Order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)
